jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Navin's - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Navin's. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Property Consultant to strengthen our Ludhiana-based team.

About Navin's:
Navin's is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Navin's!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
